# Add CreationDate Columns 
spark.sql(f"ALTER TABLE aemo_bronze.nem12_bronze ADD COLUMNS (CreationDate STRING);")

spark.sql(f"ALTER TABLE aemo_silver.nem12_silver ADD COLUMNS (CreationDate STRING);")

spark.sql(f"ALTER TABLE aemo_gold.factmeterconsumption ADD COLUMNS (CreationDate STRING);")

# Update AEMO HashDiff
COLUMNS_FOR_HASH_DIFF = ['NMI','RegisterID','NMIConfiguration','IntervalLength','UnitOfMeasurementId','Timestamp','IntervalDate','VersionHeader','FromParticipant','ToParticipant','NMISuffix','MDMDataStreamIdentifier','MeterSerialNumber','NextScheduledReadDate','FinalQualityMethodId','FinalReasonCodeId','MSATSLoadDateTime','QualityMethodId','ReasonCodeId','TransCodeId','RetServiceOrder','ReadDatetime','IndexRead','FileName']

# Get data from Bronze
df = spark.read.table("aemo_bronze.nem12_bronze")

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

df = df.withColumn("NewHashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||",*COLUMNS_FOR_HASH_DIFF),256))
df = df.withColumn("OldHashDiff",col("Nem12HashDiff")) # Creating a backup to test changes
df = df.withColumn("Nem12HashDiff",col("NewHashDiff")) # Replacing HashDiff column with new HashDiff values

# Cleanup Unnecessary Columns
cols_to_include = [c for c in df.columns if c not in ["NewHashDiff","OldHashDiff","NewHashKey","OldHashKey"]]
df_with_necessary_cols = df.select(*cols_to_include)
